channel.title: Openapi3 on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Openapi3 on Arrans github.io

item.title: openapi-ts/openapi-typescript
item.description: Generate TypeScript types from OpenAPI 3 specs

item.title: swagger-api/swagger-codegen
item.description: swagger-codegen contains a template-driven engine to generate documentation, API clients and server stubs in different languages by parsing your OpenAPI / Swagger definition.

item.title: zaghaghi/openapi-tui
item.description: Terminal UI to list, browse and run APIs defined with openapi spec.
